initial_draft:
Okay, I'm Player BLUE. Let's analyze the situation and decide on a move.

My resources are currently 0 dollars. RED has 100 dollars. RED is proposing to give me 1 dollar. Since I have nothing to offer in return, and I have 4 moves, it is reasonable to accept this small trade. It's better than rejecting and losing everything.

```
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> RED is offering 1 dollar. I have nothing to offer, so accepting is the best strategy to avoid immediate loss. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Accepting the trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
